summary: Builder PASS is not enough for a medium-risk VAT/reporting change because typecheck was skipped and UAT/API smoke evidence is missing. No production-code mutation should happen in review mode.

evidence_checked.name: quick baseline
evidence_checked.details: ./b.sh --quick reported PASS in supplied evidence log.

evidence_checked.name: typecheck
evidence_checked.details: npm run typecheck was skipped despite API/domain logic changes.

evidence_checked.name: targeted VAT unit test
evidence_checked.details: VAT reporting spec passed in supplied evidence log.

evidence_checked.name: UAT/API smoke
evidence_checked.details: Runtime path was not smoked; PASS is not allowed for medium VAT/reporting risk until covered.

findings.claim: Evidence is incomplete for accounting-domain logic.
findings.evidence: typecheck=SKIPPED and UAT/API smoke=MISSING in evidence log.
findings.required_followup: Run npm run typecheck and a focused VAT/reporting API or UAT smoke, then re-run independent review.

stop_conditions_hit: runtime PASS claim without UAT/API smoke evidence
next_action_hint: Start a bounded QA agent to run missing typecheck and VAT/reporting smoke only.
verification_required_before_pass: focused VAT/reporting API or UAT smoke
